steps.title: Set up
steps.content: A day has 1,440 total minutes. Let $y$ = non-daylight minutes. With 840 daylight minutes: $$840 + y = 1440$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, $600$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
